RETURN MAIL: BENCH LETTER MAILED TO DEFENDANT JOANNE HERNON.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2012 IS CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-27-2012 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 DEFENDANT PAID THE FULL JUDGMENT AMOUNT OF $2520 ON 7/25/12 IN ROOM 103. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. BENCH LETTER ISSUED ON 7/18/12 IS WITHDRAWN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGMENT PAID IN FULL ON 7/25/12 IN ROOM IN 103. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $2,520.00 RE 30923 FOR TRANSACTION W0512725D005 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO MICHAEL ROBERT HANNEKEN, DOC #1904751947, WARRANT #38202292, DATED SEP-10-2012
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HERNON, JOANNE
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
